allow: PowerShell(python -m mkdocs build 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\mkdocs_build.log" -Encoding utf8; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\mkdocs_build.log" -Encoding utf8 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — site is up"; if \($r.Content -match "fGPU 교과서"\) { "landing page title OK" } } catch { "not reachable yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/onboarding/05-cuda-layers-and-hook-walkthrough/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($r.Content -match "github.com/jaewoo-rain/GpuCluster/blob/main/hook"\) { "LIVE: 코드 링크가 GitHub 주소로 변환되어 서빙 중 \(HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } else { "서버는 떴으나 아직 이전 빌드 — 재시작 필요" } } catch { "서버 응답 없음: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
